_comment: tFold-TCR 5-chain input TEMPLATE. Top level is a JSON ARRAY of complexes (predict.py expects a list, matching examples/tcr_pmhc_example.json). Replace every REPLACE_* value with a real, sourced amino-acid sequence (IMGT/UniProt/stitchr) and drop this _comment before running. Do NOT run as-is. See ../README.md '## Input'. The TCR must be HLA-matched to the patient allele, NOT DMF5 (A*02:01-restricted) for our A*02:01-negative patient - that pairing is what #1245 exists to resolve.
name: REPLACE_complex_name__eg_chr22neo_<HLA-matched-TCR>_<patient-allele>
